rules: High Stress = Low Peripheral Awareness (Must Compensate)

story.en: Tactical environments trigger a massive release of glucocorticoids, compromising the Prefrontal Cortex. This module recalibrates your physiological baseline to prevent cognitive freezing.

inf.en: Forced parasympathetic dominance to maintain fine motor skill retention.

q.en: Bio-Assessment: Heart rate reaches 145 BPM. Which neurological failure is imminent?

ex: Sympathetic over-arousal leads to loss of peripheral data and critical failure in security.

inf.en: Filters sensory noise to optimize target acquisition speed.

story.en: In high-resolution 4K environments, 'Threat vs. Non-Threat' discrimination must occur in under 200ms. We optimize the OODA loop at the neurological level.

q.en: Target identification is obscured by low-light/NVG conditions. PID is not established. Action?

ex: Rules of Engagement require Positive Identification to prevent fratricide/collateral damage.

story.en: Unexpected kinetic stimuli trigger the midbrain. This mission trains the bypass of the startle response to maintain weapon platform stability.

inf.en: Maintains attention on command frequency amidst high-decibel environmental stress.

tx.en: MISSION 4: ETHICAL JUDGMENT UNDER KINETIC PRESSURE

story.en: The Law of Armed Conflict (LOAC) is not an academic exercise; it is an operational constraint. Test your moral discipline under simulated fire.

q.en: A combatant is incapacitated but still reaches for a radio. Tactical Status?

op: Secure target and assess medical status
ex: Incapacitated subjects must be secured according to Geneva Convention and SFS protocols.

story.en: VR-induced kinesis occurs when visual and vestibular signals conflict. This calibration prevents motion sickness and ensures 360-degree orientation.

inf.en: Balances the inner ear to ensure high-mobility efficiency in the 3D VR space.

story.en: Immediately following high-stress simulation, memory is hyper-fragmented. We utilize neuro-calm to ensure accurate AAR (After Action Report) data.

inf.en: Transfers acute stress data to long-term memory for objective operational analysis.

tx.en: Stability allows for objective truth in reporting.

story.en: Voice and presence are weapons of de-escalation. Command the environment without expending ammunition.

q.en: Non-compliant civilian blocks a tactical path. Correct application of authority?

op: Direct commands with physiological dominance and clear exit route
ex: Directional commands reduce civilian cognitive paralysis and clear the AO.

story.en: Adversaries utilize 'Tactical Mimicry'. Look beyond the visual. Identify the behavioral deviation before the kinetic event.

q.en: Subject is dressed as local clergy but maintains military-grade posture and gear-check habits. Analysis?

op: Treat as High-Value Interest / Immediate Threat
ex: Behavioral incongruity is a primary indicator of hostile intent in Force-on-Force scenarios.

story.en: An 8-man element functions as a single neural network. Your biometrics affect your team. Synchronize for mission success.

inf.en: Aligns the team's heart rate variability (HRV) for tactical synchronization.

story.en: Neuro-cognitive calibration complete. Physiological response is suppressed. Ethical compass is aligned. You are ready for simulation.

b.tx: 736 SFS READY - DEPLOY TO VR PLATFORM
